'''zoshasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccocervical|buccocervical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccocervical|buccocervical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zoshasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshasithi|zoshasithi]] || [[word:zoshasiji|zoshasiji]] || [[word:zoshasishi|zoshasishi]] || [[word:zoshasiki|zoshasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshasuthuthu|zoshasuthuthu]] || [[word:zoshasujuju|zoshasujuju]] || [[word:zoshasushushu|zoshasushushu]] || [[word:zoshasukuku|zoshasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshasuthu|zoshasuthu]] || [[word:zoshasuju|zoshasuju]] || [[word:zoshasushu|zoshasushu]] || [[word:zoshasuku|zoshasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshasufthuf|zoshasufthuf]] || [[word:zoshasufjuf|zoshasufjuf]] || [[word:zoshasufshuf|zoshasufshuf]] || [[word:zoshasufkuf|zoshasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshasethe|zoshasethe]] || [[word:zoshaseje|zoshaseje]] || [[word:zoshaseshe|zoshaseshe]] || [[word:zoshaseke|zoshaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshasothotho|zoshasothotho]] || [[word:zoshasojojo|zoshasojojo]] || [[word:zoshasoshosho|zoshasoshosho]] || [[word:zoshasokoko|zoshasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshasotho|zoshasotho]] || [[word:zoshasojo|zoshasojo]] || [[word:zoshasosho|zoshasosho]] || [[word:zoshasoko|zoshasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshasofthof|zoshasofthof]] || [[word:zoshasofjof|zoshasofjof]] || [[word:zoshasofshof|zoshasofshof]] || [[word:zoshasofkof|zoshasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshasïfthïf|zoshasïfthïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfjïf|zoshasïfjïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfshïf|zoshasïfshïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfkïf|zoshasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshasïfthïfthïf|zoshasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfjïfjïf|zoshasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfshïfshïf|zoshasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfkïfkïf|zoshasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshasïfthïf|zoshasïfthïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfjïf|zoshasïfjïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfshïf|zoshasïfshïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfkïf|zoshasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshasïfthïf|zoshasïfthïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfjïf|zoshasïfjïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfshïf|zoshasïfshïf]] || [[word:zoshasïfkïf|zoshasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshasæthæ|zoshasæthæ]] || [[word:zoshasæjæ|zoshasæjæ]] || [[word:zoshasæshæ|zoshasæshæ]] || [[word:zoshasækæ|zoshasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshasathatha|zoshasathatha]] || [[word:zoshasajaja|zoshasajaja]] || [[word:zoshasashasha|zoshasashasha]] || [[word:zoshasakaka|zoshasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshasatha|zoshasatha]] || [[word:zoshasaja|zoshasaja]] || [[word:zoshasasha|zoshasasha]] || [[word:zoshasaka|zoshasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshasafthaf|zoshasafthaf]] || [[word:zoshasafjaf|zoshasafjaf]] || [[word:zoshasafshaf|zoshasafshaf]] || [[word:zoshasafkaf|zoshasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zoshasasha|zoshasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zoshashësha|zoshashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zoshasrosha|zoshasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zoshasmusha|zoshasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zoshasyasha|zoshasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozoshasnkshësha|gozoshasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozoshasnkrosha|gozoshasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozoshasnkmusha|gozoshasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozoshasnkyasha|gozoshasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zoshashasasha|zoshashasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zoshashashësha|zoshashashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zoshashasrosha|zoshashasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zoshashasmusha|zoshashasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zoshashasyasha|zoshashasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozoshashasnkshësha|gozoshashasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozoshashasnkrosha|gozoshashasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozoshashasnkmusha|gozoshashasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozoshashasnkyasha|gozoshashasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zeshæsasha|zeshæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zeshæshësha|zeshæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zeshæsrosha|zeshæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zeshæsmusha|zeshæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zeshæsyasha|zeshæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozeshæsnkshësha|gozeshæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozeshæsnkrosha|gozeshæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozeshæsnkmusha|gozeshæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozeshæsnkyasha|gozeshæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zoshfasasha|zoshfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zoshfashësha|zoshfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zoshfasrosha|zoshfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zoshfasmusha|zoshfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zoshfasyasha|zoshfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozoshfasnkshësha|gozoshfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozoshfasnkrosha|gozoshfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozoshfasnkmusha|gozoshfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozoshfasnkyasha|gozoshfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
